entries.en-US:
---
name: tailwind
description: Using TailwindCSS in Remotion.
metadata:
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: tailwind
description: 在Remotion中使用TailwindCSS。
metadata:
---

entries.en-US: You can and should use TailwindCSS in Remotion, if TailwindCSS is installed in the project.
entries.zh-Hans: 你可以在 Remotion 中使用 TailwindCSS，前提是 TailwindCSS 已安装在项目中。

entries.en-US: Don't use `transition-*` or `animate-*` classes - always animate using the `useCurrentFrame()` hook.
entries.zh-Hans: 不要使用 `transition-*` 或 `animate-*` 类——始终使用 `useCurrentFrame()` 钩子进行动画处理。

entries.en-US: Tailwind must be installed and enabled first in a Remotion project - fetch  <https://www.remotion.dev/docs/tailwind> using WebFetch for instructions.
entries.zh-Hans: Tailwind 必须首先在 Remotion 项目中安装并启用——请通过 WebFetch 获取 <https://www.remotion.dev/docs/tailwind> 以获取说明。
